questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the complete path of the first blue ball, listing every component it interacts with in order.
questions.answer: The first blue ball drops from the blue hopper at (2, -1), rolls onto the first ramp_right at (3, 1), then ramp_left at (4, 2), ramp_left at (5, 3), ramp_right at (6, 4), ramp_right at (4, 5), ramp_right at (5, 6), ramp_left at (6, 7), ramp_left at (7, 8), and exits at the left side of the board.

questions.question: In what order do balls exit the machine (blue exit, red exit, or intercepted)?
questions.answer: All 8 blue balls exit at the blue (left) exit. No balls are intercepted.

questions.question: How many total ramps (both fixed and placed) are on the board in the solution?
questions.answer: There are 8 ramps total: 4 fixed ramps in the starting setup and 4 ramps placed by the solution.
